entities.name: PEARL MILLET (ICMV2)
entities.description: The Pennisetum glaucum cv. ICMV2 developed for registration

entities.name: SOUNA III
entities.description: A pearl millet variety used as a yield comparison

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance to the pathogen Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: A fungal pathogen that causes downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: MOESZIOMYCES BULLATUS
entities.description: A pathogen to which ICMV2 is resistant

entities.name: RAGHUVA ALBIPUNCTELLA
entities.description: The raghuva moth, a pest of pearl millet

entities.name: RAGHUVA MOTH TOLERANCE
entities.description: Tolerance to the raghuva moth, associated with compact ear heads

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The average grain production measured in yield trials

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical growth of the plant, measured as 1.8-2.8 m for ICMV2

entities.name: STEM ROBUSTNESS
entities.description: The strength and quality of the plant stems

entities.name: FLOWERING TIME
entities.description: The duration from planting to flowering, 47 to 68 days for ICMV2

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The duration from planting to maturity, 85 to 100 days for ICMV2

entities.name: COMPACT EAR HEADS
entities.description: The physical structure of the ear heads, contributing to pest tolerance

entities.name: GRAIN SIZE
entities.description: The physical dimensions of the grains, described as medium-sized

entities.name: 1000-GRAIN WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of 1000 grains, ranging from 6.0 to 9.4 g

entities.name: VITREOUS ENDOSPERM
entities.description: The glassy appearance and texture of the grain endosperm

entities.name: SEED DORMANCY
entities.description: The period during which seeds are unable to germinate

entities.name: MOLD DAMAGE TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability to resist mold damage during ripening

entities.name: HUMID CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions characterized by high humidity

entities.name: BULKING
entities.description: The process of combining seed quantities to develop the cultivar

entities.name: CROSSING
entities.description: The process of pairing different entries to create new genetic combinations

entities.name: YIELD TRIALS
entities.description: Replicated trials used to evaluate the average yield of the cultivar

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: Origin of a line resistant to downy mildew

entities.name: UGANDA
entities.description: Origin of a composite and a Cassidy dwarf population

entities.name: KANSAS
entities.description: Origin of the Cassidy dwarf population

entities.name: SENEGAL
entities.description: Location where replicated yield trials were conducted
